verification.pnpm_exec_tsc_noEmit_api: exit 1 — TS5101 baseUrl deprecation only; no import-resolution errors on changed files
verification.attempt_3_delta: No additional code edits; attempt-1 migration verified complete. Attempt 2 LLM verifier failed due to scratch-path infrastructure error (wrong wt/ prefix in orchestrator path); tsc/lint/static all passed. Attempt 3 re-verifies success criteria independently.

notes: All 20 write_set paths migrated off @meriter/shared-types barrel to zone-6 allowlisted subpaths (value-rubricator, decree809-tag-remap, events, tappalka, merit-transfer, demo-event-seed-targets, schemas). Nine Mongoose schema SOURCE OF TRUTH comments retargeted from libs/shared-types/src/schemas.ts to @meriter/shared-types/schemas with correct EntitySchema names. Attempt 3 confirms code state unchanged from attempt 1; prior orchestrator failure was LLM verifier scratch-path mismatch only.
